segments.text: So the counselling services we offer deal with any problems arising from your studies, or in your life outside the university.
segments.translation: 我们的咨询服务，致力于你学习生活中或校园外产生的任何问题。

segments.text: Let's take academic counselling.
segments.translation: 我们先谈谈学业方面的咨询。

segments.text: If you're confused about subjects or how to combine them in your degree, then we can advise you and discuss the career you are aiming for, so that you can see it all in context.
segments.translation: 如果你对课程感到困惑，或者不知道如何把它们融入到你的学位中去，我们可以为你提供建议，并讨论你的职业规划。这样你就可以把这样的问题放到一个大环境下去考虑了。

segments.text: We can also chase up your tutor if you're not getting proper feedback on how you are getting on in your subject.
segments.translation: 如果你没有得到有关课程进展的合适反馈，我们也可以提醒你的导师。

segments.text: Besides help with academic problems, you may also need personal counselling: if you think you're already under stress, well, just wait till classes begin next week.
segments.translation: 除了帮助解决学术问题，你也许需要个人咨询。如果你觉得有压力，嗯，等到下周课程开始。

segments.text: You'll have to start adjusting to teaching and learning methods that may be unfamiliar to you, as well as the mounting pressure as the deadline for that first assignment creeps up on you.
segments.translation: 你要必须开始适应你不熟悉的教学与学习方法，以及逐渐增加的压力和第一份作业的截止日期。

segments.text: And of course, you have to cope with all this without your usual social network - you know, the social contacts, family and friends you could normally rely on for help.
segments.translation: 当然，你要必须学会在没有日常的社会关系网中处理所有事情，你知道的，交往的人，家庭和朋友，他们通常可以信赖和帮助你。

segments.text: All of this causes anxiety.
segments.translation: 所有这些都会造成焦虑。

segments.text: Studying overseas can trigger a personal crisis - you may have left a lot of what you might call 'unfinished business' back in your own country, or you may have interrupted personal relationships or even sometimes have broken them off to come overseas, and so the student often feels lonely, unhappy, unmotivated and unable to concentrate on studying.
segments.translation: 海外学习可能触发个人危机。你可能已经落下很多在祖国没有处理的事情。或者，你可能会因为出国而被阻断个人关系，或者甚至有时关系破裂的情况。所以，学生经常感到孤单，不开心，没有动力，不能集中精力到学习上。

segments.text: Or there may be other things bothering you.
segments.translation: 或存在其他困扰。

segments.text: Our resident chaplain can offer you spiritual guidance if that's what you want, or we can put you in touch with community groups that can provide you with social contacts and friendship.
segments.translation: 如果你想要（这些服务），我们的常驻牧师可以给你提供精神指导，我们可以和你的社区团体保持联系，为你提供社交联谊。

segments.text: What about exam stress?
segments.translation: 关于考试压力呢？

segments.text: It affects nearly everyone to some extent, but especially overseas students like yourselves.
segments.translation: 在某种程度上，它几乎影响每个人，但尤其是像你们这样的海外学生。

segments.text: There may be a huge amount of family pressure on you to succeed, and if you fail a subject or drop out of a course because it's too difficult then your self- esteem can suffer.
segments.translation: 你可能为了成功，身上有巨大的家庭负担。而且如果你挂了科或未完成学业是因为它太难，然后自尊心可能受挫。

segments.text: But it's not the end of the world if you don't pass an exam -I had to resit First Year Anthropology, so I can certainly offer you a sympathetic ear!
segments.translation: 但是考试没过并不是什么世界末日。我大一学人类学时也曾补考过，所以我会很乐意倾听你们的遭遇。

segments.text: Anyway, exam failure can lead to worrying changes in the way you normally behave.
segments.translation: 总之，考试失败可能导致你日常行为出现令人担忧的变化。

segments.text: You may also be off your food, or you may have dietary problems because the local food is not to your liking and upsets you, and this can affect your health and studies.
segments.translation: 你可能会不再有胃口，或因不喜欢当地食物而产生饮食问题，让你沮丧，这些可能影响你的健康和学习。

segments.text: Glenda Roberts is our dietician in the Health Service and we can put you on to her.
segments.translation: Glenda Roberts是我们的健康服务饮食专家，有什么问题可以问她。

segments.text: And we all have money problems, don't we?
segments.translation: 我们都有资金问题，对吗？

segments.text: But remember, full-time students can get a low -interest loan of up to six hundred dollars to buy books and for similar study-related expenses.
segments.translation: 但是记住，全日制学生可获得一笔600元的低息贷款，用来买书或支付其他相关学习费用。

segments.text: That's right, and you can get double that amount if you can't afford an item of equipment you need for your course - a musical instrument, for example.
segments.translation: 对。如果你买不起课程需要的器材，例如乐器，你可以得到双倍数量的贷款。

segments.text: And it doesn't stop there.
segments.translation: 还不止这些。

segments.text: When you move into a flat, starting-up expenses, including furniture for it, can be covered by a loan through the Welfare Service - see Jill Freeman for details.
segments.translation: 当你搬进公寓，所有福利服务涵盖了起始花费，包括家具。看看Jill Freeman具体怎么说。

segments.text: Can we help you?
segments.translation: 我们能够帮你吗？

segments.text: Well, last academic year, in spite of staff cuts, we counselled two hundred and forty international students for a total of twenty-six hundred hours counselling, and, finally we won all but just one of the twelve appeals that we launched on behalf of students.
segments.translation: 上个学年，尽管人手不够，我们对240个国际学生进行了咨询，共2600小时。我们代表学生们提起了12宗申诉，除了一宗之外，最终全部获胜。

segments.text: Not too bad for an understaffed service, don't you think?
segments.translation: 在人手不够的情况下不算太坏吧？

segments.text: That's all from me. Thank you.
segments.translation: 就这样，谢谢。
